prerequisites: An Imagga account (sign up free at imagga.com/auth/signup).
Your Imagga API key and API secret, both shown in the Imagga dashboard at imagga.com/profile/dashboard after signup.
Outbound HTTPS access to the Imagga API at https://api.imagga.com (all API calls must be made over HTTPS).

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (API key and secret)
authMethods.summary: Imagga authenticates with HTTP Basic auth. Your API key acts as the username and your API secret acts as the password, sent as an Authorization header formatted as `Authorization: Basic base64(api_key:api_secret)`. Provide both the `api_key` and `api_secret` secret fields. Credentials remain valid until you rotate or revoke them in the dashboard, so no token refresh is required. Because Basic auth transmits credentials on every request, all calls must use HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Create an Imagga account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for a free account at https://imagga.com/auth/signup. A free API key is available without upgrading; you can change plans later from the Billing details page in your account.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API key and API secret
setupSteps.body: Log in and open the Imagga dashboard at https://imagga.com/profile/dashboard. Copy the displayed API key and API secret. The API key acts as the username and the API secret as the password for Basic auth. Keep them secure and do not expose them in client-side code.

setupSteps.title: Enter your credentials
setupSteps.body: Provide the `api_key` and `api_secret` values in the connector's credential fields. Both are required secret fields and are combined into the `Authorization: Basic base64(api_key:api_secret)` header on each request.

setupSteps.title: Set the optional image for detection
setupSteps.body: Optionally set the `img_for_detection` field to the image URL or reference you want the connector to analyze. This field is not required; leave it blank to use the connector's default behavior.
